visual_description: A man in a dark blue shirt sits on a couch, looking toward his right, while a woman in a white blouse and blue pants sits beside him, her hands clasped and gaze directed forward. Behind them, another person in a dark shirt and jeans stands with hands resting on the back of the couch. A blonde woman in a patterned blouse stands in front of a wooden cabinet, gesturing with her hands as she speaks to someone off-camera.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate pace, speaking neutrally and without any noticeable inflection.
